name: The Doctrine of the Sovereign Anvil
notes: Safety first: Power down, unplug, hold power 15–30s to discharge. Use ESD precautions.
If under warranty, prefer vendor service for board-level faults.

items.problem: No power, no LEDs, no fan spin
items.fix: Try known-good charger/cable/outlet; check barrel/USB-C seating. Hard reset (remove AC + battery if removable, hold power 30s). Inspect DC-in jack; replace jack/daughterboard if loose. Attempt RTC reset. Bench test minimal config (one RAM stick, no drives).

items.problem: Powers on then instantly off; boot loop
items.fix: Reseat RAM; test each SODIMM/slot. Remove externals. Clear CMOS/BIOS defaults. Check heatsink/paste. Update BIOS if accessible. Unplug suspect peripherals (keyboard/trackpad/backlight) one by one.
Decode vendor pattern. Reseat/replace indicated part; clean contacts with isopropyl. If GPU/CPU is soldered, board repair or replacement may be required.

items.problem: Stuck at logo; can’t enter BIOS/UEFI
items.fix: Remove USB devices. Press BIOS key early (Del/F2/ESC). Reset NVRAM/CMOS. If hang on storage init, unplug drives; update BIOS.
Replace RTC cell or pack; set time in BIOS; update BIOS to reduce RTC bugs.
Disconnect power/battery. Disassemble; clean with 90–99% IPA; dry thoroughly. Ultrasonic clean if advanced corrosion. Replace corroded connectors/cables; board repair if shorts remain.

items.problem: Shorted components; blown MOSFET/fuse; burnt traces
items.fix: Board diagnostics (thermal camera, bench PSU current limit). Replace faulty MOSFET/fuse; repair traces (professional).
Reflash EC/BIOS; install OEM EC updates. If still failing → mainboard replacement.
Replace DC jack/daughterboard; verify continuity to board.
Clean fins; ensure correct VRM thermal pads. Improve airflow; consider undervolt/PL1/PL2 tuning. Replace inductors only if necessary.
Update BIOS/EC package from OEM. Perform EC reset (battery + AC removed, hold power 30s).
Neutralize corrosion, replace RTC cell/holder, inspect nearby traces.
Dust clean; repaste; verify heatsink pressure/fan operation; replace pads as specced; restore fan curves; verify PL1/PL2 limits.

items.problem: Bad paste/poor heatsink contact; bent heatpipe
items.fix: Repaste and reseat evenly; replace heatsink if the heatpipe is damaged.
Reset BIOS defaults; use OEM utility/XTU/RyzenAdj to set sane limits; update BIOS tables.

items.problem: Artifacts, TDR timeouts, black screens, driver resets
items.fix: Clean-install graphics drivers (DDU safe mode on Windows). Check temps; repaste/repad; disable overclocks; increase TDR timeout for testing only.

items.problem: dGPU not detected / mux/Optimus switching faults
items.fix: Toggle mux/Hybrid in BIOS; update BIOS/VBIOS; reinstall chipset/iGPU/dGPU drivers in order; reseat modular dGPU if applicable.
Improve VRAM thermals with correct pads; ensure adapter wattage/PD headroom; reduce power target.
Run MemTest86 (UEFI). Reseat; test one stick at a time; match speeds/voltages; replace defective SODIMM; clean slot contacts.
Reseat modules; use matched pair for dual-channel; set XMP/JEDEC appropriately.
Clean contacts carefully; try alternate slot; replace riser/board if slot is bad.

items.problem: Clogged fins; fan bearing failure or coil whine
items.fix: Reverse-blow dust; disassemble to clean; replace noisy or stuck fan.

items.problem: Dried pads/paste; wrong pad thickness; misaligned sink
items.fix: Replace with OEM-spec pads; tighten screws in cross pattern; ensure even contact.

items.problem: Fan not reported (RPM=0); fan curve stuck
items.fix: Reconnect fan header; EC reset; BIOS/EC update; replace fan if tach line faulty.

items.problem: Broken hinges, stripped screws, warped deck
items.fix: Replace hinges/anchor plates/covers; reinforce standoffs if needed.

items.problem: Touchpad click jammed; keyboard deck flex
items.fix: Reseat touchpad; remove debris; replace bracket/palmrest if deformed.
Realign magnet/sensor or replace; adjust OS sleep settings.

items.problem: Ambient light / proximity / gyro not detected
items.fix: Reinstall sensor hub/chipset drivers; check BIOS toggles.

items.problem: Dead/stuck pixels; backlight bleed; PWM flicker
items.fix: Pixel tools rarely help; replace panel for dead pixels/bleed. Prefer panels with DC dimming or higher refresh to avoid PWM.
Replace panel or backlight board (older CCFL: inverter). Check display cable.

items.problem: eDP/LVDS cable pinch → flicker with lid movement
items.fix: Replace/reroute display cable; adjust hinge tension.
Run pixel refresh; reduce static UI; configure VRR correctly; replace panel if severe.
Replace panel (TCON integrated on most).

items.problem: DSC compression/HBR bandwidth limits; MST issues
items.fix: Use certified cables; reduce resolution/refresh or color depth; update dock/GPU FW; prefer direct single-cable connections.
Force RGB full range; avoid YCbCr 4:2:0 for text use.
Toggle HDR; clear EDID overrides; try different port/cable; update GPU/dock/monitor firmware.
Toggle VRR/GSYNC; choose discrete-only or hybrid per OEM guidance; update BIOS/GPU drivers.

items.problem: Digitizer ghost touches; pen not pairing
items.fix: Clean bezel; reseat digitizer flex; reinstall HID/digitizer drivers; re-pair pen; replace digitizer if damaged.
Open privacy shutter; reinstall camera/IR drivers; enable in BIOS; realign IR module; re-run Windows Hello setup.

items.problem: Jack detect stuck; one channel dead
items.fix: Replug; clean jack; set correct headset type in OEM utility; replace jack board if switch failed.
Update NIC/GPU drivers; disable aggressive power-saves; use LatencyMon to identify and remove bad drivers.
Use grounded outlet/adapter; try another PSU; avoid ungrounded extension cords.

items.problem: Mic array noisy; BT audio stuck in HFP mode
items.fix: Choose correct input; disable AGC/enhancements; for BT select A2DP/HFP appropriately; disable 'hands-free telephony' when you want stereo.
Disable exclusive mode or align sample rates in device/DAW settings.

items.problem: ASIO vs WDM driver contention; headset impedance auto-detect failure
items.fix: Use correct driver model for your DAW; set fixed impedance profile in OEM app or use an inline attenuator.
Reseat ribbon; clean contacts; replace keyboard/palmrest if matrix failed.
Update firmware; switch to Precision driver; adjust palm rejection settings.
Remove duplicates; install correct OEM package and mode.
Backup immediately; replace SSD; update firmware on replacement.

items.problem: SATA flex cable damage → CRC errors
items.fix: Replace SATA cable; secure routing; avoid tight bends.
Add thermal pad/heatsink; improve airflow; ensure screws tight; avoid blocking intake.

items.problem: Wrong M.2 key/type or slot bandwidth capped
items.fix: Verify slot support (NVMe vs SATA) and lanes; move drive to main slot if needed.
Update SSD firmware via vendor tool; update BIOS.
Clone/backup; surface scan; replace drive if counts rise.
Backup; run vendor diagnostics; replace if media/data errors persist.

items.problem: DRAM-less SSD stutters; SLC cache exhausted
items.fix: Keep 10–20% free space; avoid mixed heavy writes; upgrade to DRAM SSD.

items.problem: QLC sustained write slowdown; TRIM not working
items.fix: Enable TRIM; keep free space; update drivers; prefer TLC/MLC for heavy workloads.

items.problem: File system corruption from hard power-offs
items.fix: Run chkdsk/fsck; restore from backup; fix root-cause power loss.
Switch to AHCI with proper Windows registry change, or install RST drivers.
Retrieve recovery key; suspend BitLocker before firmware changes; back up keys to account.

items.problem: TRIM disabled; write caching off; misalignment
items.fix: Enable TRIM; enable write caching; realign partitions.

items.problem: Intel Optane remnants; dual-boot bootloader tangles
items.fix: Remove Optane metadata with Intel tool; repair bootloader (bcdboot/GRUB).

items.problem: High disk queue length; 100% active time at low MB/s
items.fix: Check antivirus/indexer; update drivers/firmware; check cable/port; run SMART; replace failing drive.
Swap cable/port; update controller/firmware; back up & replace disk.
Replace drive; manage namespaces with vendor tool if misconfigured.
Remove with hdparm/vendor tool (data-destructive).
Take ownership/reset ACLs; decrypt with keys; avoid EFS without escrow.

items.problem: APFS snapshot bloat; Time Machine saturation
items.fix: Prune snapshots; ensure backups run; free space.
Mark 'Always keep on this device' before travel; verify sign-in.
Clear CSC cache; re-enable Offline Files; apply latest patches.

items.problem: Rapid wear; low full-charge capacity; high cycle count
items.fix: Calibrate (charge → rest → full discharge → full charge). Replace pack if worn; set charge thresholds (~80%).
Stop use; replace battery; reseat cable; update EC; recalibrate fuel gauge.

items.problem: Wrong wattage/PD profile; ID pin errors
items.fix: Use OEM-rated adapter; e-marked USB-C cable; for Dell ID, use genuine PSU or replace DC board.

items.problem: Negotiates only 5 V; dock underpowering system
items.fix: Use 20 V PD charger; update dock; use barrel adapter if required for full power.

items.problem: S0ix vs S3 mismatch; battery drain during sleep
items.fix: Use `powercfg /sleepstudy` to find offenders; prefer S3 if BIOS supports; disable Modern Standby wake sources.
Disable 'allow this device to wake'; block wake timers; check scheduled tasks.
Enable in BIOS; install chipset drivers; enable ASPM (Linux kernel params).

items.problem: Battery shipping mode stuck; fan table bugs
items.fix: EC reset; update BIOS/EC; exit shipping mode per OEM tool.

items.problem: Power only / no data; SS lanes dead; ESD damage
items.fix: Try other port/cable; disable USB selective suspend; reinstall controllers; replace damaged port board.

items.problem: Security level blocks devices; firmware/driver mismatch
items.fix: Approve device in TB Control Center; update TB firmware/driver; adjust security level.

items.problem: Bandwidth/MST hot-plug instability; dock FW outdated
items.fix: Update dock FW; reduce monitors/refresh; prefer single high-bandwidth link.

items.problem: No signal; EDID/HDCP failures; wrong cable spec
items.fix: Try another cable/port; power-cycle monitor; set supported mode; update GPU/dock FW; toggle HDCP.
Use correct TRRS standard or adapter; clean jack; set headset type in OEM app.

items.problem: Bent pins; UHS not negotiated; exFAT corruption
items.fix: Replace reader; match card UHS rating; reformat card properly.

items.problem: Loose screws; missing thermal pads for NVMe
items.fix: Install correct pads; secure screws; add heatsink if needed.

items.problem: Hot-plug failures; bandwidth bottlenecks; power passthrough issues
items.fix: Cold-plug and boot; use certified TB cable; update dock/GPU FW; ensure PSU wattage suffices.
Enable in BIOS; toggle Airplane mode; reinstall WLAN driver; reseat module; fix/replace antennas at hinge.
Use compatible module; avoid whitelisted models unless BIOS is modded.
Set adapter to Maximum Performance; disable aggressive roaming/power saves; update drivers and AP firmware.
Prefer 5/6 GHz; pick stable channels; disable DFS if client struggles.
Separate SSIDs per band; reduce Tx power on far APs; enable or disable 802.11k/v/r based on stability.

items.problem: Low MCS; high retries; wrong reg domain
items.fix: Lock channel width; correct country code; move closer; replace damaged antennas.

items.problem: WPA3 transition; captive portal; DHCP exhaustion
items.fix: Use WPA2-only SSID for legacy; forget/rejoin; open browser to trigger portal; expand DHCP scope.
Use reliable DNS; align DoH/DoT with network; set MTU 1500/1492; remove obsolete VPN/proxy entries.
Test with IPv6 off; align resolver; disable DNSSEC/DoH if middleboxes intercept TLS.

items.problem: NIC offload bugs; Internet Connection Sharing left on
items.fix: Disable LSO/RSC/Checksum offloads as test; turn off ICS/bridging.
Move Wi‑Fi to 5/6 GHz; update combo driver; relocate USB 2.0 dongles away from antenna lines.

items.problem: Pairing DB corrupt; device limit reached
items.fix: Remove all devices, clear BT cache, re‑pair; update headset firmware.
Force A2DP for music; disable hands‑free telephony when not needed; install vendor codec support (aptX/LDAC where available).

items.problem: Driver missing; power management suspends NIC
items.fix: Install correct driver; disable 'allow computer to turn off this device'; force 1 Gbps full duplex.
Replace cable; fix speed/duplex; avoid PoE ports or adjust injector settings.

items.problem: SIM/eSIM not provisioned; APN wrong; carrier lock
items.fix: Confirm plan; correct APN; unlock device; update WWAN firmware.
Move for better signal; force supported band if possible; consider different carrier.

items.problem: EAP‑TLS cert expiry; RADIUS profile/VLAN mismatch
items.fix: Renew client certs; correct supplicant profile; verify VLAN assignment; coordinate with network team.
Disable MAC randomization for trusted SSIDs.

items.problem: Fast Boot hides USB boot; Secure Boot blocks OS
items.fix: Disable Fast Boot; add boot entry; enroll keys or temporarily disable Secure Boot to install, then re-enable.

items.problem: Outdated microcode; Intel ME/AMD PSP corruption
items.fix: Update BIOS/firmware; run Intel CSME/AMD PSP updates.
Boot Safe Mode; DDU and reinstall drivers; switch back to Hybrid in BIOS.
Adjust UMA buffer; update BIOS; match RAM modules.
Rebuild BCD (bootrec/bcdboot); recreate ESP; enable WinRE (reagentc /enable).
Convert MBR→GPT (mbr2gpt); disable CSM/Legacy.
Enter recovery key; disable hardware locking; manage Opal with vendor tool; store keys securely.
Clear Intel metadata; remove HPA/DCO (data-destructive).
Chroot from live media; reinstall GRUB; rebuild initramfs.
Use owner passwords, provide proof to vendor; mainboard swap if irrecoverable.
Enter recovery key; suspend BitLocker prior to future firmware changes.
Remove biometrics; reinstall drivers/firmware; re‑enroll.
Relax WDAC policy; sign drivers; disable HVCI only if necessary and re‑enable after fix.
Approve system extension; grant TCC privacy; disable SIP only temporarily, then re‑enable.
Enroll MOK for signed drivers; add policy exceptions; verify kernel cmdline options.
SFC/DISM or in‑place repair (Windows); reinstall over top (macOS); reinstall packages/kernel (Linux); restore from backups if severe.
Clean uninstall (DDU for GPU); install in vendor order: chipset → ME/PSP → GPU → audio → others.

items.problem: Windows Update loops; macOS stalls; Linux kernel mismatch
items.fix: Reset Windows Update components; run SetupDiag; free space; unplug peripherals. macOS: Safe Mode update; prune APFS snapshots.
Tame indexing; schedule AV scans; clean Startup/Task Scheduler; inspect with Process Explorer/Activity Monitor/top.
Choose one hypervisor; align virtual switches; fix WSL2/Docker DNS; enable VT‑x/AMD‑V/IOMMU in BIOS.
Install required runtimes; install Rosetta 2; correct PATH for Python/Java.
Offline scan; reset browsers; remove malicious startup tasks; consider clean OS reinstall if persistence suspected.
Create a new profile; migrate data; remove broken profile.

items.problem: Power passthrough limits; MST instability; outdated firmware
items.fix: Update dock firmware; use single high‑bandwidth cable; reduce monitor count/refresh; supply adequate PSU to dock.

items.problem: USB bridge quirks; UASP vs BOT
items.fix: Prefer UASP enclosures; update bridge firmware; use short quality cables; avoid front‑panel hubs.

items.problem: Driver bloatware; spooler crashes; IPP vs legacy
items.fix: Use class driver or IPP; restart spooler; isolate driver; update certificates for IPP‑TLS; unique Bonjour name.

items.problem: Driver contention; bandwidth saturation on shared hubs
items.fix: Distribute devices across controllers; use powered hubs; avoid 2.4 GHz dongles near Wi‑Fi antennas.
Use antistatic mat/wrist strap; avoid carpet; ground yourself before handling internals.
Regular cleaning; silica gel in storage; avoid damp areas.

items.problem: Brownouts; dirty AC; bad surge protectors
items.fix: Use quality surge protector/UPS; avoid cheap ungrounded adapters.
Warm to room temp before power-on; avoid hot cars; allow moisture to evaporate before use.

items.problem: TLS/certificate failures due to bad time
items.fix: Enable NTP; replace RTC cell; correct BIOS/OS time.
Enable automatic timezone; enforce via GPO/mobileconfig if needed.

items.problem: Expired device/user certs; TPM attestation fails
items.fix: Renew certs; clear TPM only after backing up keys; rejoin domain/Intune if required.

items.problem: Profiles disabling cameras/USB/BT or enforcing restrictive policies
items.fix: Review assignments; move device to correct compliance group; remove conflicting profiles.

items.problem: Kernel hooks/filters causing BSODs/high DPC; VPN firewall rules
items.fix: Update EDR; add exclusions; test without EDR/VPN; coordinate with SecOps.
Renew client certs; verify supplicant; deploy via GPO/MDM correctly.
Update driver/firmware; re‑enroll biometrics.
Enable in BIOS; install drivers; check hidden devices; replace module if absent.
Enable Sensor Monitoring Service; reinstall sensor hub; toggle rotation lock.
